name: deep_research_assistant
description: Research a given topic on the open web, synthesize a structured multi-section report, and save it to a dated markdown file. Unattended; never asks the user anything.

variables.description: Desired depth/length of the report, e.g. 'Standard - 3-5 pages'.
Raw research collected on the topic: findings, key statistics, recent developments, stakeholder perspectives, and source URLs.
The final structured report synthesized from research_findings, written to the dated results file.

settings.action: Web search `topic` per `research_depth`. Gather findings, key stats, recent developments, stakeholder perspectives, source URLs into `research_findings`.

From `research_findings`, write `research_report` with sections: Executive Summary (3-5 key findings, bottom line conclusion, recommended action), Background & Context, Current State, Key Findings (with supporting evidence), Different Perspectives (consensus/debate), Implications (risks/opportunities), Recommended Actions (prioritized next steps), Sources (reliability rating, gaps noted), Questions for Further Research.
Write `research_report` to markdown file `deep_research_assistant_<timestamp>.md` (current date/time) in cwd. No questions; unattended run.
